title: Tata Motors Commercial is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Tata Motors Commercial is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Tata Motors Commercial! We are hiring a Warehouse Manager for our Kanpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Tata Motors Commercial:
Tata Motors Commercial is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Motors Commercial!
